title: The End of the Century Is Quite Normal. Kenshiro Appears!
overview: Kenshiro was supposed to be the savior at the end of the world, but right now, he was just trying to find a job. The three brothers, Kenshiro, Toki, and Raoh, happened to reunite at a convenience store and now fight for the part-time position.

title: Sing, Kenshiro, to Take Back the Love!!
Money Never Dies! South Star Is the Enemy!
overview: Ryuryuken decides to put out a booth at the neighborhood festival. The three brothers are told that whoever gets the most sales at the event, will get the opportunity to work at the store. However, they realize they are completely surrounded by South Star booths...

title: Don't Sleep!! The Convenience Store Without a Headstone!
Dastardly! Hell Is Too Kind for Stalkers!
overview: Lin's friend, Airi, is being stalked. The three brothers immediately come to her aid, saying they'll take care of the stalker. They sneakily follow Airi around and soon find out it's not just a stalker that follows Airi around...

title: There Are No Bananas! Kenshiro's First Shopping Trip
Hey, It's Me! Raoh and the Little Old Woman
overview: Raoh gets a call from someone claiming to know him, while he's working alone at the convenience store. The caller says that he's Toki, and that he needs to prepare money for a little old lady that he met...

title: Healthy! Healthy Lifestyle!! In the Case of Toki-san
The Girl Who Wants to Get Married, Love Is Confusing
overview: Mamiya has appeared at the convenience store. Kenshiro is shocked that Mamiya looks just like his beloved Yuria. She overhears him say that she looks like his beloved, and she falls head over heels for him. And then Mamiya's father, Rei, who loves Mamiya, and Juda who loves Rei, all appear...

title: It's Juza of the Clouds, the Brothers in Trouble
What's Your Name? Thouzer's English Cram School
overview: A weird mikoshi appears at the convenience store... and the one riding it was Thouzer. The ones carrying the mikoshi were his students at his English cram school. One of those kids happens to escape and asks the three brothers for help.

title: One Summer's Fist, as Many as the Waves!
The Homeless Saviors! They'll Just Have to Build a House!
overview: The three brothers have finally been thrown out of their apartment. With nowhere else to go, the three go to the park. While there, they overhear a mother reading "The Three Little Pigs" to her child, and the three brothers attempt to recreate the house-building techniques from the book...

title: Mars Atta-ttacks! Yuria Sang That Day
Raoh Is Kidnapped! Suddenly a Love Story
overview: Raoh and Black King were on a walk. Black King remembers the first time he met Raoh, when suddenly, Raoh is kidnapped.

title: Jagi Is the Star! I Was Waiting for This
Take Back Yuria! Kenshiro vs. Shin vs. Yokohama Gang Part One
overview: Mamiya has appeared at the convenience store. Kenshiro is shocked that Mamiya looks just like his beloved Yuria. She overhears him say that she looks like his beloved, and she falls head over heels for him. And then Mamiya's father, Rei, who loves Mamiya, and Juda who loves Rei, all appear...

title: Take Back Yuria! Kenshiro vs. Shin vs. Yokohama Sightseeing Part Two
He Is as Firm as a Rock! Fudo Moves!
overview: Bat meets Fudo, the kind giant who has a dark past that teaches kindergarten and all of the girls of DD go on a girls' night out.

title: What Is a Girls' Night Out? We'd Like to Ask You!
Yororei Yororei! Rei, Take Back the Love
overview: With the kinda salary Rei gives Kenshiro, he can finally make a living yearly wage! YURIAAAA!!!

title: The Time Has Come! Kenshiro vs. Raoh, The Intense Battle!
Raoh Catches a Cold!
overview: Raoh catches a cold and keeps seeing Yuria while Kenshiro gets drunk and tells everyone how he really feels.

title: Kenshiro Gets Drunk!
Battle to the Death! South Star vs. North Star
overview: Kenshio and Shin finally have their last battle and the true mastermind is revealed.

title: The Final Battle, Kenshiro vs. Yuria?!
I Found a Minor End of the Century
overview: In his search for the End of the Century, Kenshiro comes upon "End of the Century Academy," where Lin mistakes him for a transfer student and takes him to the Second-Year Rice Class. Then, out of nowhere, Zeed and the Trumps attack!

title: The Villain and His Friends
overview: Seeking to become Student Council President and get the school under his thumb, Shin challenges Kenshiro to a fight. Kenshiro defeats the Trumps on the way to the Black Class, but waiting for him when he arrives is... a giant pig?!

title: Episode 3
Three Brothers (Not Dango)
overview: Peace is restored to End of the Century Academy, when Toki and Raoh appear, hoping to join the school. Ryuken will only allow one of them to join, and gives them a mission to determine who that will be.

title: The Clock Tower's Elevator
overview: Ryuken gives the brothers a new mission: to fix the school's clock tower, which is running slow. But upon arriving at the soaring structure with its solid gold flag at the top, they find...

title: Episode 6
Yes, Let's Go to the Nurse's Office
overview: The brothers' next mission is to travel to the nurse's office and retrieve band-aids, but they're forced to rush around the school when they find out the office has moved.

title: A Serious Bicycle Death Road
overview: Nurse Yuria sends the brothers a postcard inviting them to join her in Hokkaido, so they off on Toki's bicycles to join her on her vacation. With a hundred hostages cheering him on, Shuu challenges Thouzer to a fight.

title: Episode 9
The School Stair Ghost Scare Blick, Block, Black!
overview: The three brothers are offered a free pass to the nurse's office in exchange for vanquishing a ghost in the bathroom.

title: Toki-san's Sweet Deal
overview: Toki explains how he got into the black market business.

title: Episode 12
overview: Thouzer challenges Kenshiro to a fight. But this one little kid in a turban breaks his heart with his constant interference...

title: You Can't Do Without a Pyramid!
overview: The class takes a field trip to the great pyramid of Hokuto, where the guide, Thouzer, is eager to get Ryuken to rack up as much debt as possible.

title: Right or Wrong, a Strong School Song!
overview: Raoh engages earnestly with their next mission, the writing End of the Century Academy's school song. But he's soon stymied by the list of unacceptable words... Strawberry Flavor - Thouzer captures the child in the turban so that he can concentrate on the fight with Kenshiro. But when the child disappears from his restraints, Thouzer feels the weight of imminent danger pressing down upon him!

title: Episode 15
Best Ep Evar
overview: When Raoh goes to Fudo's house to give him a print-out he missed, he ends up stuck to Fudo's body! Unable to escape, he is forced to experience Fudo's bizarre lifestyle first-hand...

title: Happiness from a Hidebu Quiz
overview: Rihaku holds a quiz show to ask the characters about various school anime-appropriate subjects, but the questions all turn out to be bizarre. There's a twist ending, too!

title: Episode 18
overview: No matter how many times Kenshiro beats him, Thouzer refuses to let his soul be broken. He pours out his heart about the tragic memories from his youth.

title: Episode 19
overview: Toh presents a counting song about her blissful married life with Raoh.

title: Green Peppers for Fried Rice, but Beans for Story
overview: Shin returns to End of the Century Academy, takes back his student ID, and tries to kidnap Yuria!

title: Episode 21
overview: Thouzer, Shin, Juda, Rei, and Shu offer an interview commemorating the debut of their new idol unit, Nanto DE 5MEN.

title: Ryuken's Murder Case
overview: Ryuken has been murdered! If they want to get their student ID, the three brothers must find the true culprit.

title: I'm Him, and Who's He?
overview: When Ryuken and Yuria take a tumble down the stairs together, they accidentally switch bodies. The strange situation is complicated even further when Shin arrives...

title: Episode 24
overview: Thouzer and his gang make their passionate singing debut as Nanto DE5MEN's first single is unveiled.

title: Idol, Idoled, Idoling
overview: The principal has hired his favorite idol, Asuka, to perform at the school. There are rumors that someone might try to lick her, so the three brothers must act as her bodyguards.

title: It's an Anime DD-Version Momotaro
overview: The Seed Class is performing the story of Momotaro for the school arts festival. But no one can decide who should play the leading part...

title: Episode 27
overview: Shin, unable to confess his feelings to Kenshiro, tries various things to get his attention.

title: Is This What a Voice Actor Is?
overview: End of the Century Academy is offering a voice actor course, but only one student, Airi, joins. The three brothers also study the art of voice acting, and compete with her at an audition.

title: Mam Up With Youth!
overview: A student teacher named comes to the Seed Class. She immediately grabs the hearts of the students, and takes them on an adventure.

title: Episode 30
overview: The surprising past for Fudo the Demon is told, and we catch a glimpse into Emperor Thouzer's strange everyday life.

title: Brothers Space
overview: Ryuken ends up hanging from the top of End of the Century Tower, with Yuria's office on the other end. Moving towards either one will accept the balance. What will Kenshiro and Raoh do?

title: A Sudden Christmas Carol
overview: Toki gets lost in a strange city while going to the convenience store for Ryuken. Starving, he steals a loaf of bread, and is forced to hide from pursuit in a local house, where a little girl mistakes him for Santa Claus.

title: Episode 33
overview: The members of Nanto barge uninvited into Juda's house.

title: The Ultimate Papier-mâché Plan
overview: Han, Hyoh, and Kaioh have come from their own schools to attack End of the Century Academy. And they're after... . Ryuken?!

title: Papier-mâché, Be Eternal
overview: The three brothers get over their hesitance and join Shin, Mr. Seed Rice, the Seed Class, Devil Ribako, Rin, and Bat in defending the school. How will the final conflict turn out?!

title: Episode 36
overview: The final battle rages between Kenshiro and Thouzer.
